workshoptitle: DB Security - Web HR App with Oracle Deep Data Security Application Identities

tutorials.description: Understand the architecture of this workshop and what it can do

tutorials.description: Run a simple web application that authenticates users with Microsoft Entra ID, uses a database connection pool, and demonstrates application data-role elevation
